title: Power Gems Update
description: Let's create a world just to find the new ores, blocks to build and much more, let's find the ruby, emerald set and the quartz one also, for an unbelieavable adventure. Travel, explore, search, craft, and don't forget to join... the nether.... for the new
body: Let's create a world just to find the new ores, blocks to build and much more, let's find the ruby, emerald set and the quartz one also, for an unbelieavable adventure. Travel, explore, search, craft, and don't forget to join... the nether.... for the new quartz variant and become immune to fire with the new quartz armor or get better prices from villagers! All this in the Power Gems Update, try it!!
